content.en:
According to the setting of this space-time line, Shigemiya has a grade division.

They are the yellow-level heavy palace, the Xuan-level heavy palace, the earth-level heavy palace, the heaven-level heavy palace, the emperor-level heavy palace, the supreme-level heavy palace, and the ultimate heavy palace.

However, the Heaven-level Heavy Palace is a legend on the side of Zilan Mountain, let alone the Ultimate Heavy Palace.

With these exercises obtained by Ye Tian, the condensed heavy palace can only be regarded as a yellow-level heavy palace.

The heavy palace condensed by this body is only a yellow-level heavy palace, so the strength is not very high, and the combat power of the same level is weak.

The heavy palace can be changed, but if you want to change it, you have to pay a huge price, or you can rebuild it and directly shatter the heavy palace, but the cultivation will also dissipate, if you don't get it right, it will be scrapped directly.

With Ye Tian's realm, he could naturally break the heavy palace without harming this body.

However, he was not in a hurry to crush himself to re-embody the "Nine-Five-Zero" Palace, after all, he didn't have a better Heavy Palace Technique now.

Of course, it wasn't a big deal for him, and he could completely create a Heavy Palace Technique by himself.

So in the following years, he continued to study various exercises, and even studied the remnants of various exercises from a long time, and gradually gained a fundamental understanding and perception of the Chonggong exercises.

Soon, he created a very good Heavy Palace Technique - Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace!

This is a combination of its own ten thousand ways of law, created by the heavy palace exercises.

Due to the limited time, his technique is currently only an emperor-level heavy palace exercise, but fortunately, the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace can be promoted, it is a promotionable heavy palace, with an infinite future, as long as he continues to improve the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace in the future, he will be able to perfect the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace to the level of the ultimate heavy palace.

......

"Let's get started!"

Ye Tian hid in Zilan Mountain's home, opened the formation, and then shattered himself into the palace.

I saw that there was a palace-like phantom in the void in his body, and that was the Heavy Palace.

As soon as his mind moved, the heavy palace began to collapse, the mana in his body began to dissipate, and his physical body began to wither.

His countenance began to grow old, as if he were about to fall.

But Ye Tian didn't care, after the collapse of the Heavy Palace, he quickly cultivated the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace, and frantically absorbed the energy of the outside world.

Gradually, a brand-new heavy palace was condensed in his body, and the scale of this heavy palace far exceeded the previous inferior heavy palace, and it became more and more condensed, just like a real palace.

At the same time, his mana was also re-condensed, nourishing his physical body and allowing it to rise rapidly.

The first heaven and one order!

The first heaven and the second order!

The First Heaven Third Order!

......

As time passed, the cultivation of this body skyrocketed, and it soon recovered to the level of the seventh order of the Third Heaven.

After all, this body had reached this realm before, and if he cultivated with his realm, he would naturally be able to return to his original cultivation soon.

Moreover, the cultivation speed of the Ten Thousand Laws Heavy Palace far exceeded the cultivation method of the inferior Heavy Palace, and it didn't take long for his cultivation to reach the first order of the Fourth Heaven.

At this point, if you want to continue to improve, you have to consume resources, otherwise your cultivation speed will be very slow.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to obtain resources, he also had to create some secret palace moves suitable for himself first to enhance the strength of this body.

Although he knows a lot of Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane and space-time level Extreme Path Ultimate Arcane, he can't perform it at all, and he can also use weak moves, but he is not suitable for this heavy palace system.

He had to modify it a little to fit the heavy palace system perfectly, so that the strength of this body could be brought into play.

After a period of time, Ye Tian successfully created some secret methods of the Heavy Palace.

He created three heaven-level heavy palace secret methods and one emperor-level heavy palace secret method respectively, which was enough for the time being, after all, in the small place of Zilan Mountain, there was no need for him to spend a long time creating any powerful supreme-level heavy palace secret methods.

These four Heavy Palace Secret Methods were all created by him, and he easily cultivated them to the consummation realm.

With his current strength, it was very easy to kill the cultivators of the Fifth and Sixth Heavens, but it was even more difficult to kill the cultivators of the Seventh Heaven.

After all, every time there is a gap in this space-time line, the gap in strength is very large, even if it is difficult for him to cross the realm to fight, mainly because the mana in his body and the physical body do not support it!

......

Zilan Mountain.

Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce.

Xiao Ya, the president of the Chamber of Commerce, was very sad at the moment, because the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce was now suppressed by many chambers of commerce, and even some of the chambers of commerce's offerings were poached by other chambers of commerce.

"President, those chambers of commerce don't know where to recruit a few people who can refine the Chonggong Xuanlu, the quality is very good, and now we supply a large amount of Chonggong Xuanli, we can't compete at all. An old man from the Chamber of Commerce said.

"Heavy Palace Liquid!"

Xiao Ya gritted her teeth, very annoyed in her heart.

Originally, her Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce also had a Chonggong secret master who could refine Chonggong Xuanlu, but the level was not very good, the quality was poor, and the output was small.

But now, that one has also been poached, and the promise of those chambers of commerce is to cultivate that heavy palace secret master, which makes the other party excited.

"President, do you want to go to another place to invite a powerful Heavy Palace Secret Master?" a high-ranking member asked.

Xiao Ya shook her head, "No, the closest place to Zilan Mountain is Xuandu Mountain, but Xuandu Mountain is separated from us by dangerous places such as the Tianxuan River, and it is too easy to fall without the strength of more than Nine Heavens." And our Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce is just a Ninth Heaven Ancestor, and we can't let the Ancestor take risks. Besides, even if the ancestor is willing to take risks, the secret masters of the heavy palace are not willing to take risks!"

The others didn't know what to do anymore and stopped talking.

In this small place of Zilan Mountain, the number of heavy palace secret masters is extremely small, and the status is extremely high, and it is really too difficult for them to recruit new heavy palace secret masters.

But the Heavy Palace Mystery Liquid refined by the Heavy Palace Secret Master is too important, and it is one of the necessary cultivation resources for Heavy Palace cultivators, and it can greatly improve their cultivation.

Even some high-grade 1.1-level heavy palace liquid can also help break the bottleneck and break through to a higher realm.

Other chambers of commerce can sell a large amount of Chonggong Xuanli, but the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce can't take out the Chonggong Xuanli, who will come to the Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce to buy resource items!

That's the current dilemma!

The Qingchuan Chamber of Commerce has hundreds of thousands of members, and the annual salary is unimaginably astronomical.

That's when it happened.

An employee came to report.

"President, there is a cultivator of the Four Heavens who said that he is a secret master of the Heavy Palace, and he has come to apply!"

The employee reported.

Xiao Ya frowned slightly, a little unconvinced.
